title: Enneads II.9: Against the Gnostics
description: Plotinus attacks the Gnostics: they insult the cosmos by calling it evil, when it is the best possible image of the divine.
introduction: Plotinus attacks the Gnostics: they insult the cosmos by calling it evil, when it is the best possible image of the divine.

translation.text: Those who dishonor this cosmos do not know what they do or where their audacity leads.
